summary: This topic explains how users can customize their ERP dashboard by adding frequently used options as 'Quick Links' for faster access to daily tasks.
steps: Identify an ERP option that you use on a daily basis (e.g., 'Collect Fee').
Locate the 'Quick Link' option on your dashboard or within the menu.
Add the desired option to your quick links.
The selected option will then appear as a quick link on your dashboard for direct access.
business_rules: Quick links are user-specific and can be updated according to each user's needs.
important_notes: Quick links provide convenient, one-click access to frequently used functions.
Each user can personalize their set of quick links.
questions: How do I add a quick link to my ERP dashboard?
Can I customize the quick links that appear on my interface?
Where can I find the quick link options?
